title: Step 5 resume ambiguity
rationale: Step 5 (flag parsing) is positioned after both the resume path (step 3) and fresh-start path (step 4). An implementer reading sequentially might apply the flag on resume. Consider adding a guard clause or moving inside step 4.

title: review-plans description references auto-approve before it exists
rationale: The description says 'overrides auto-approve' but auto-approve is implemented in Phase 2. Forward-looking but may confuse users before Phase 2 lands.

title: No type annotation for boolean flag
rationale: review-plans is a boolean flag but has no type field. Consistent with existing args but may need type: boolean if CLI framework later distinguishes flags from values.
